markdown:
#  Change Companies in Procore's Navigation Bar 
##  Background 
If you are a Procore user who has access permission to multiple Procore company accounts, you can switch between company accounts from Procore's navigation bar. This includes navigating back to your company's homepage.
##  Steps 
  1. Open the **Select a Project** menu. At the bottom of the menu, next to **Current Company** , click **Change**.   

  2. Type the name of the company you want to access.  

  3. Select the company from the list to be directed to the company's homepage.


## See Also
  * [What changes when companies upgrade to paid accounts?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-changes-when-companies-upgrade-to-paid-accounts)
  * [Navigate Procore's Tools](https://v2.support.procore.com/product-manuals/login-and-account-management/tutorials/navigate-procores-tools)
  * [What is App Management?](https://v2.support.procore.com/faq-what-is-app-management)
